context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel MASTER SYNC now includes services syncing (Step 5/9). All admin tabs (Emergency, Farewell, Membership, Celebrations, Pet Profiles, Site Status, Breeds, Memorial Wall) have key props with Date.now() to force refresh on tab switch. refreshCounter state added to useEffect dependencies for data re-fetching. Two-layer admin login verified working (AdminProtectedRoute + Admin.jsx internal).
